\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5758 introduces Quantum Tunneling Probability Tunnel Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$, the quantum tunneling probability is \begin{equation} P_{tunnel} = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} A_n \exp\left(-\frac{S_n}{\hbar}\right) \end{equation} where the instanton action \begin{equation} S_n = n \int_{d_{min}}^{d_{bolt}} \sqrt{2m_{eff}U(d')} \, dd' \end{equation} \end{theorem} \begin{proof} Apply WKB approximation to time-dependent Schrödinger equation in imaginary time $
